creator: clausgebert@googlemail.com
text:
I am trying to install 11.0-ALPHA4 on a Asus Transformer Book T100HA, but it seems the hard disk is not found. dmesg und gpart list outputs (from a 11.0-CURRENT a few month ago) can be seen in this forum discussion: https://forums.freebsd.org/threads/54292/ However, as far as I can see there is nothing special in those logs.

The suggestion in that thread was, that the controller is not supported yet, and that I might try to open a bug report.
